title: hieracium glanduliferum subsp. piliferum
intro: Hieracium glanduliferum subsp. piliferum, also known as Pilosella glandulifera, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium glanduliferum subsp. piliferum include reducing inflammation and relieving symptoms of various conditions such as arthritis and digestive issues. It is commonly prepared as a tea or tincture for medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential interactions with other medications.
